---
name: translate
description: Translate text between natural languages
---
# Translation Methodology

## Step 1: Identify Source Language
Detect the source language of the provided text.

## Step 2: Target Language Conversion
Translate the text into the requested target language, preserving tone and
idiomatic meaning where possible.

## Step 3: Review
Proofread the translation for grammatical correctness and fluency.
